nasb.text: Saul said to him, “Whose son are you, young man?” And David answered, “I am the son of your servant Jesse the Bethlehemite.”

esv.text: And Saul said to him, “Whose son are you, young man?” And David answered, “I am the son of your servant Jesse the Bethlehemite.”

cnv.text: 掃羅問他：“年輕人啊，你是誰的兒子？”大衛回答：“我是你僕人伯利恆人耶西的兒子。”

ccb.text: 扫罗问他：“年轻人，你是谁的儿子？”大卫答道：“我是你仆人伯利恒人耶西的儿子。”
